name: Rahul Krishnan
title: Data Science Master's Student
subtitle: MSc Data Science student at Universitaet Trier with approximately 4 years of software engineering experience at SAP Labs. Working across LLMs, recommender systems, graph ML, and MLOps.
currentRole: MSc Data Science at Universitaet Trier

paragraphs: I'm Rahul Krishnan, a Data Science master's student at Universitaet Trier, Germany, with a Computer Science background and approximately 4 years of professional software engineering experience at SAP Labs India. My work bridges data-driven machine learning research and the engineering discipline needed to ship it.

I build end-to-end AI systems, from training and evaluation to containerised deployment. Recent work includes a RAG resume assistant on Google Cloud Run, an Amazon Electronics recommender with a Two-Tower MLP on Azure, a HeteroGNN model for cross-lingual narrative similarity, and a study of reflective chain-of-thought faithfulness on BIG-Bench Hard.

My MSc thesis at Trier compresses the runtime KV cache of large language models as a 3rd-order tensor (Tucker, CP, TT, t-SVD), framing per-layer rank allocation as constrained optimisation under a global memory budget. My broader interests sit at the intersection of LLM inference efficiency, alignment and evaluation, recommender systems, and reliable MLOps.
